ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * DataDirect Networks: Jason Huselton * Oak Ridge National Lab: Anjus George * OpenSFS Board: Tom Crowe
== Minutes ==
Status update provided on previously assigned tasks:
* Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - Going to start reorganization of Lustre and Virtualization pages * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - No yet begun, but plan to work on Robinhood pages over the next sprint. * Jason: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-539 Lustre Wiki: Review Introductory Pages] - Began categorizing the beginner documentation into an excel spread sheet to evaluate each page. Reached out to Colin Faber regarding additional documents that may be useful. Suggested using the talk/discuss feature on the wiki pages to better communicate changes with the community since not everyone might have JIRA access. * Anjus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-541 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Internal Pages] - Working on the internals documentation and identified pages with just presentation slides. Slides may be better archived elsewhere and the pages deleted or updated. * Tom: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-538 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Quotas and OST Pools] - Reviewed; Most are very dated and will likely need a rewrite.
Special thanks to Cyrus for running meeting while Ellis was out at Supercomputing (along with many others from the DWG/Lustre community).
[[Category:DWG]]
